title: Eberlanzia triticiformis

Traditionally, Eberlanzia triticiformis is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Eberlanzia triticiformis is often used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
